suites.title: [Core] CRUD Relationship between Student and Parent records

cases.title: [Core] Create a Parent Type Relationship record between Student and Parent records successfully
cases.description:
* Required fields for the Relationship record:
    * From
    * To
    * Type
    * Relationship
* Appropriate permission:
    * View Student/Parent record details:
        * Platform\_View\_students\_and\_parents\_basic\_and\_related\_info
        * Platform\_View\_students\_and\_parents\_contact\_info
    * CRU Student/Parent record details:
        * Platform\_Edit\_students\_and\_parents\_basic\_and\_related\_info
        * Platform\_Edit\_students\_and\_parents\_contact\_info

steps.text: I logged in to SF as a Staff with appropriate permission
I logged in to BO as a Staff with appropriate permission
a Student and Parent records existed
I created a Parent Relationship record between the Student and Parent records with valid required fields
a success message is displayed, indicating "Relationship was created"
the Parent Relationship record is created with inputted information successfully
the Parent Relationship is synced to BO successfully in the Family tab of the Student detail page

cases.title: [Core] Validation: Student has only one Default Parent
cases.description:
* Required fields for the Relationship record:
    * From
    * To
    * Type
    * Relationship
* Appropriate permission:
    * View Student/Parent record details:

    * CRU Student/Parent record details:

steps.text: I logged in to SF as a Staff with appropriate permission
a Student record existed with a Default Parent
another Parent record existed
I created a new Relationship record between the Student and Parent records with Default Parent checked
an error message is displayed, indicating "Default parent already exists."
the Relationship record is not created

cases.title: [Core] Update Default Parent and Relationship fields of a Relationship record successfully
cases.description:
* Required fields for the Relationship record:
    * From
    * To
    * Type
    * Relationship
* Appropriate permission:

steps.text: I logged in to SF as a Staff with appropriate permission
a Student record existed with Default Parent
I updated the Default Parent checkbox and Relationship field of the Relationship record
a success message is displayed, indicating "Relationship was saved"
the Default Parent checkbox and Relationship field of the Relationship record is updated accordingly

a Relationship record between Student and Parent records existed

those fields can not be updated

steps.text: I logged in to SF as a Staff with appropriate permission
two Student records existed
I created a Sibling Relationship record between two Student records with valid required fields
a success message is displayed, indicating "Relationship was created"
the Sibling Relationship record is created with inputted information successfully

steps.text: I logged in to SF as a Staff with appropriate permission
two Student records existed
a Parent Relationship record between Student 1 and Parent 1 record existed
I created a Parent Relationship record between Student 2 and Parent 1 records with valid required fields
a success message is displayed, indicating "Relationship was created"
the Parent Relationship record between Student 2 and Parent 1 records is created with inputted information successfully
the Sibling Relationship record between Student 1 and Student 2 records is auto-created

steps.text: I logged in to SF as a Staff with appropriate permission
I logged in to BO as a Staff with appropriate permission
a Parent Relationship record existed
a Sibling Relationship record existed
I deleted the Parent Relationship record
a success message is displayed, indicating "Relationship was deleted"
the Parent Relationship record is deleted successfully
the Parent Relationship is deleted from the Family tab of the Student detail page on BO successfully
I deleted the Sibling Relationship record
a success message is displayed, indicating "Relationship was deleted"
the Sibling Relationship record is deleted successfully
the Sibling Relationship is deleted from the Family tab of the Student detail page on BO successfully
